description: A content block displaying grouped physical addresses organized by state/region. Each group has a heading and one or more office addresses with optional phone numbers.

FR-01.title: Region/State Grouping
FR-01.description: Addresses MUST be grouped under regional headings.

FR-02.title: Address Display
FR-02.description: Each office MUST display a complete mailing address.

FR-03.title: Phone Number Links
FR-03.description: Phone numbers SHOULD be displayed as clickable tel: links.
acceptance: Clickable on mobile for direct dialing

FR-04.title: Group Separators
FR-04.description: Horizontal rules MUST separate address groups.

accessibility.AC-01: Heading hierarchy MUST be logical (H1 country > H5 states is noted as a gap - should be H2 or H3)
accessibility.AC-02: Phone numbers MUST use tel: protocol for accessibility
accessibility.AC-03: Address blocks SHOULD use <address> element or structured data
